tagline: Discover the jewel of the Mediterranean
noPlacesYetSub: Check back soon for new listings.
noFavoritesSub: Save places you love to find them here.
loginRequiredMsg: You need to be logged in to access this page.
loginToFavorites: Log in to save your favorite places.
about_p1: Explore Matrouh is your comprehensive guide to discovering the beautiful coastal city of Marsa Matrouh on Egypt's Mediterranean coast. We curate the best beaches, hotels, restaurants, and experiences this stunning region has to offer.
about_p2: Whether you're planning a family getaway, a beach vacation, or a cultural journey, our app helps you find the perfect spots and plan unforgettable memories along Egypt's most beautiful coastline.
connect_desc: Have questions or suggestions? Reach out through any of our channels.
privacy_text:
This Privacy Policy describes how Explore Matrouh collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our application.

We collect information you provide directly, such as your name and email when you create an account. We use this information to provide and improve our services, personalize your experience, and communicate with you.

We may collect usage data to improve the app, including which places you view and searches you perform. This data is anonymized and used only for analytics.

Your data is stored securely using Supabase infrastructure with industry-standard encryption. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting us. We will process your request within 30 days.

For questions about this policy, please contact us through the About & Contact page.
emailNotConfirmed: Check your email to confirm your account.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this place? This action cannot be undone.
onboarding_desc_1: Explore the stunning beaches and hidden gems of Egypt's most beautiful Mediterranean coastal city.
onboarding_desc_2: From world-class beaches to cozy cafes and restaurants — find everything you need in one place.
onboarding_desc_3: Save your favorites, get directions, and book directly through WhatsApp. Your adventure starts here.
